sn7.20:1.1: At Sāvatthī. Then a mendicant brahmin approached the Blessed One … and said to him: "Master Gotama, I am a mendicant and you are a mendicant. What is the difference between us in this respect?"
sn7.20:4.1: When this was said, the mendicant brahmin said to the Blessed One: "Magnificent, Master Gotama! Magnificent, Master Gotama! … Let Master Gotama remember me as a lay follower who from today has gone for refuge for life."
